MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, PROPOUNDED TO DEFENDANT RASHID RASHID, ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. [A COPY OF THE REQUESTS SHOULD BE ATTACHED AS AN EXHIBIT TO THE PROPOSED ORDER PREPARED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL.] DEFENDANT IS TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DISCOVERY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $360.00 WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER MEAD, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Roger E. Jackson of Law offices of Roger E. jackson (707) 318-2994 appeared for plaintiff.

The Cort adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB's Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions. The unopposed motion of plaintiff American Express Bank is granted. Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions, Set One, propounded to defendant Rashid Rashid, are deemed admitted. [A copy of the Requests should be attached as an exhibit to the proposed order prepared by plaintiff's counsel.] Defendant is to pay to plaintiff's counsel discovery sanctions in the amount of $360.00 within 30 days of notice of entry of the order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (302/JPT)
